candidate.completion: reply before my self-esteem starts a podcast.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please reply before my self-esteem starts a podcast.

evaluation.rationale: A clear comic image and a reasonably exact pivot, but the turn is more contemporary escalation than a sharp logical reversal. It lands cleanly and has some quotable shape, though the podcast gag feels a bit effortful rather than inevitable.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
